notes:
v1.1.1 Patch
🐛 Chirp now defers automatic refreshes while a user is composing a post, editing profile fields, using GM overlays, or attaching a DM image. Missed updates are applied in one refresh as soon as it is safe, so active input is no longer interrupted.

announcement.title: 🐦 Chirp App v1.1.1
announcement.content:
Chirp App v1.1.1 is a small stability patch.

  • Realtime Updates: Chirp now waits before refreshing while users are composing posts, editing profiles, using GM overlays, or attaching DM images.
  • Any missed updates are applied in one refresh once it is safe, so timelines still catch up without interrupting active input.
